updates.title: Firestore Hybrid Sync
updates.description: Improved connection reliability. The app now handles offline states and permission errors gracefully.

updates.title: Gemini 1.5 Integration
updates.description: Mascot AI is now powered by Gemini 1.5 Flash for faster, more intelligent motivational responses.

updates.title: Scheduler V2
updates.description: Server-side notification scheduler is now project-aware, ensuring reminders hit your device exactly on time.

updates.title: Furniture Stability
updates.description: Fixed the 'messy room' bug! Your furniture arrangements are now perfectly preserved across sessions.

updates.title: Layering Logic
updates.description: Moved items now automatically jump to the top layer for easier interior design.

updates.title: Glassmorphism 2.0
updates.description: Entire app redesigned with premium glass-blur effects and fluid transitions.

updates.title: Leveling System
updates.description: New XP and Level system to track your productivity progress.
